hero.pill: Age Management & Corrective Skincare · Eugene, Oregon
hero.heading: Healthy skin, lasting results
hero.lede:
Personalized Corrective Skincare in Eugene, Oregon

Whether you’re concerned about fine lines, wrinkles, acne, rosacea, pigmentation, dehydration, or skin sensitivity, every treatment is customized using advanced technologies like Glo2Facial®, Jet Plasma®, BioRePeel®, and ProCell® Microchanneling to restore skin health from within, not simply mask concerns

Healthy skin ages better. Start your journey with a personalized treatment plan designed for lasting results.

services.heading: Treatments designed for healthy, lasting results, customized for
services.sub: Every treatment at Polished Skin in Eugene, Oregon is customized to your skin’s unique needs. Whether your goal is age management, rosacea relief, acne improvement, hyperpigmentation correction, or skin barrier restoration, we combine science backed treatments to improve skin health and deliver results that continue long after your appointment.

science.heading: Personalized treatments. Healthier skin.
science.body:
You don’t have to know which treatment is right for you, that’s our job.

At **Polished Skin in Eugene, Oregon**, every appointment begins with a comprehensive skin consultation. We assess your skin’s condition, discuss your concerns and goals, and create a personalized treatment plan designed specifically for you. Whether you’re looking for **age management, acne treatment, rosacea care, hyperpigmentation correction, or skin barrier restoration**, every recommendation is based on what your skin truly needs.

By combining advanced treatments like **Glo2Facial®, Jet Plasma®, BioRePeel®, ProCell® Microchanneling, and customized corrective facials**, we focus on improving your skin’s health, supporting collagen production, strengthening the skin barrier, and delivering results that continue to improve over time.

Because healthier skin doesn’t come from chasing trends—it comes from understanding your skin and treating it with intention.

**Healthy skin ages better.**

steps.title: Discover
steps.text: Every journey begins with a personalized skin consultation. We’ll evaluate your skin, discuss your goals, and identify what’s contributing to your concerns so we can create a treatment plan tailored specifically to you.

steps.title: Customize
steps.text: Using advanced corrective skincare treatments and professional-grade products, we build a customized plan designed to improve your skin’s function, not just its appearance. Every recommendation is based on your unique skin, not a one-size-fits-all facial.

steps.title: Transform
steps.text: Through consistency, expert guidance, and treatments tailored to your skin, you’ll experience healthier, stronger, more resilient skin with results that continue to improve long after your appointment.

results.heading: Real results. Healthier skin.
results.body:
At Polished Skin Eugene, we specialize in **corrective skincare and age management** that improves your skin’s health, not just its appearance. Every treatment plan is customized to address your unique concerns, whether you’re looking to improve **fine lines, acne, rosacea, hyperpigmentation, dehydration, skin texture, or overall skin health**.

Our approach combines advanced treatments like **Glo2Facial®, Jet Plasma®, BioRePeel®, and ProCell® Microchanneling** to stimulate collagen, strengthen the skin barrier, reduce inflammation, and create healthier, more resilient skin.

These transformations aren’t the result of a single facial, they’re achieved through personalized care, professional guidance, consistency, and treatments designed specifically for each client’s skin.

about.heading: Healthy skin starts here. Personalized care.
about.body:
At **Polished Skin in Eugene, Oregon**, we believe healthy skin ages better.

Founded by licensed esthetician **Analisa Hickey**, Polished Skin is a results driven corrective skincare studio specializing in **age management, rosacea, acne, hyperpigmentation, skin barrier repair, and long-term skin health**. Our philosophy is simple: improve how your skin functions so it naturally looks healthier, stronger, and more radiant.

Unlike one-size-fits-all facials, every recommendation is intentional because no two clients, and no two skin journeys, are the same.

**Our Promise to Every Client**

- Personalized treatment plans designed specifically for your skin.
- Science-backed treatments that prioritize skin health over quick fixes.
- Professional guidance and education so you understand _why_ your skin behaves the way it does.
- Long-term results through consistency, customization, and expert care.

cards.title: Healthy Skin Ages Better
